crime.quote: As she hided and watched as her parents die a painful death.

victim.value: Mallory's parents, killed two years ago while Mallory hid and watched
victim.quote: It had been 2 years since her parents death.

culprit_and_motive.value: Oliver, a killer who has been searching for Mallory for years, motive unclear but involves her demonic nature
culprit_and_motive.quote: After so many years of searching I found her

red_herring.value: Initial misdirection suggesting aunt as threat when Mallory screams 'bloody murder thinking it was the person that killed her parents'
red_herring.quote: Mallory screamed bloody murder thinking it was the person that killed her parents. only to see her aunt.

clue_fairness.value: Reader learns Mallory witnessed parents' murder and that killer has been searching for her for years
clue_fairness.quote: As she hided and watched as her parents die a painful death

social_world.value: Military aunt as guardian, school hierarchy where Mallory is 'the schools bad Ass', church/therapy institutional control
social_world.quote: her aunt was very up tite! Probably becaus She's in the military

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural element - Mallory revealed as 'The powerful demons daughter' unknown to military aunt
reveal_mechanic.quote: she took in what she hated the most, what she was trained to kill, she took in a demon

investigator_wound.value: Mallory's survivor guilt and self-hatred for hiding while parents were killed
investigator_wound.quote: She hated her self for hiding, mabe if she didn't hide the killer would of jest killed her and not her parents
